failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing one matching item and produced an incorrect negative answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available beginner Jigsaw Puzzles costing more than $45.76. The tool output at index 3 returned one matching item with price 46.13, available=true, difficulty level=beginner. At index 4, the Executor had this relevant tool output but synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool result and was not resolved later.
